sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49842" key="i)dioqa/natos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰδῐο-θάνᾰτος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n49842.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dying a natural death</tr_> (cf. <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἴδιος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0527.tlg027:1:6b" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.6b</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:19:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">19.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
